{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322040212E65D9AA3B12E1CEFA25B"}"},"total":11721},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7309154082030732041","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"也是把目前的章节都看完了，文笔确实不错，在番茄里算是上等了，但剧情方面有些偏向于虐了，感觉心脏不好。希望作者不要为了延长篇幅而制造各种误会，读者看着确实难受，发点糖也让人能看下去呢，然后就是主线感觉不够突出，感觉可以多些文字来解释人物动机，读书动脑子其实是可以的，但别老让人想，看着累，希望作者受累能多更几章吧，很期待后续剧情"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701796138,"group_id":"7282235053952732175","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随手写写，希望大家生活顺利","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9h6yznvxAPkBbVqHlWkum1p3TbnXbV89rTO5Q7p5t7B","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/32c48b24d2b84394842207332779579d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704045&x-signature=PYuKtCySo6xrVVHBqBSdejE4Ofg%3D","user_id":"2661265825610398","user_name":"我妻阮梅梅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2661265825610398","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7282235053952732175","book_info":{"abstract":"【扮猪吃虎+杀伐果断+阴险狡诈+同级无敌】
叶凌天穿越到一本女频权谋小说中，成为大周反派三皇子，开局便要和女主凤惑君成婚？
洞房花烛夜的时候，疯批女主竟然要置我于死地，原因是她爱我入骨？
当涂有剧毒的匕首插入我的心脏之时，我知道自己凉了，我这个反派竟然真的活不过三集。
临死之际，我绑定了长生抽奖系统，只要抽奖就能变强。
“恭喜宿主获得体质百毒不侵。”
“恭喜宿主获得过目不忘本领。”
“......”
很好，接下来我要开始猥琐发育、扮猪吃虎了。
疯批女主对着我死亡的地方痛哭流泪，因为她亲手杀死了自己最爱的男人！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fbe9026c8259f95e6bdebda272aa684f","author":"孤山放牛娃","author_id":"","book_id":"7282235053952732175","book_name":"黄粱一梦，疯批女主竟恨我入骨","book_short_name":"凤凌天下","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e0d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7282235335843512866","read_count":"113307","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3503290"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1673","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,扮猪吃虎,穿书,无敌,架空,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7c56b16c0
